steps.title: Identify the subject and its number
steps.content: The subject is The Amur River—a singular noun. The relative clause “which is 2,714 miles long” is additional information set off by commas; it doesn't change the subject's number.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Subject-verb agreement requires a singular subject to take a singular verb. Flows (B) is the only singular form. The other choices are plural verbs (flow, have flowed, are flowing), which violate agreement. That matches choice B — B is correct.
